name: Nonfarm Business Sector: Labor Share (index, 2017=100), annual mean
formula: annual mean of quarterly FRED PRS85006173

name: Corporate-business labor share (BEA-native)
formula: 100 * T1.14 line 4 (Compensation of employees, corporate) / line 1 (Gross value added, corporate)

name: Nonfinancial corporate profit share / markup proxy
formula: 100 * T1.14 line 27 (NFC corporate profits w/ IVA+CCAdj) / line 17 (NFC gross value added)

name: Total corporate profit share (secondary)
formula: 100 * T1.14 line 11 (total corporate profits w/ IVA+CCAdj) / line 1 (corporate gross value added)

name: Economy-wide profit rate (corporate profits / private net capital stock)
source: BEA NIPA T1.14 + BEA Fixed Assets 3.1ESI
formula: 100 * T1.14 line 11 (total corporate profits w/ IVA+CCAdj) / FAAt301ESI line 1 (current-cost net stock of private fixed assets)

name: Sector-matched NFC profit rate (NOT constructed)
formula: NFC profits (line 27) / NFC net fixed assets — data_unavailable: no sector-matched NFC net capital stock on disk (FAAt tables are by-industry NAICS, not by sector/legal form)
